name: Booking and contact automation
pitchTone: Operational and calm. Emphasize fewer missed requests, cleaner intake, and human approval where promises matter.
valuePropHook: A booking and contact automation setup that captures requests, asks missing questions, and routes approved next steps without making unsafe promises.

serviceOffer.headline: Booking and contact intake automation
serviceOffer.customerOutcome: Customer requests are captured with the right questions, routed for review, and followed up without losing context.

packages.name: Booking/contact setup
packages.description: Intake form, callback routing, approval gates, and status copy.

vendorRequirements: phone or inbox provider linked before live use
